UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATALIE K YOUNG, AN INDIVIDUAL $3,012.87 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,253.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (TRANSACTION ID # 15217005) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NATALIE YOUNG'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM WAGE GARNISHMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S FINANCIAL STATEMENT DEMONSTRATES THAT THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN HER MONTHLY INCOME AND MONTHLY EXPENSES IS INSUBSTANTIAL AND THEREFORE HER WAGES ARE EXEMPT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/SB

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - NATALIE YOUNG, TEL. NO. 1-415-706-9062, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Natalie Young's claim of exemption from wage garnishment is granted. Defendant's financial statement demonstrates that the difference between her monthly income and monthly expenses is insubstantial and therefore her wages are exempt. Order signed. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/sb
